prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-GOLDPANKIT-9PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 9pc Gold Prospecting Kit with Mini Classifiers Gold Pans and Collection Tools Description: Strike gold with the ASR Outdoor 9pc Gold Panning Kit, a complete prospecting set designed for beginners and experienced gold hunters alike. Whether you're exploring rivers, creeks, or paydirt at home, this kit includes the essential tools needed to efficiently separate gold from sand, gravel, and black sand concentrates.

The kit features three dual riffle gold pans (8", 10", and 12") that allow you to process material at different stages of your prospecting workflow. Use the mini classifier sieves to sort gravel and concentrate your material for faster, more efficient panning.

A large 12.5" sand scoop trowel makes collecting paydirt quick and easy, while the 3oz snifter bottle helps you safely collect fine gold flakes from the pan. Once separated, store your finds in the included 2 dram glass vial to keep your gold safe and secure.

To make cleanup even easier, the kit also includes a powerful, portable magnetic black-sand pickup tool with a quick-release handle. This tool helps remove heavy black sand from your concentrates, making it easier to spot and collect valuable gold.

Compact, lightweight, and easy to transport, the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Kit is perfect for weekend prospecting trips, family adventures, geology enthusiasts, and hobbyists looking to experience the excitement of gold discovery. Search Terms: gold panning kit beginner prospecting starter set mining equipment gold pan paydirt classifier snuffer bottle vial outdoor hobby kids adults gift treasure hunting creek river rockhounding gemstone family activity Features: - COMPLETE 9PC GOLD PANNING KIT - Everything you need to start prospecting for gold including three dual riffle pans, two mini classifiers, a snifter bottle, a black sand magnet tool, sand scoop, and gold storage vial. - 3 DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS FOR BETTER RECOVERY - Includes 8", 10", and 12" pans with dual riffle designs that help trap fine gold flakes while washing away lighter sand and gravel. - CLASSIFY MATERIAL FOR FASTER PANNING - Two mini 6" classifiers (30 holes/inch & 10 holes/inch) help separate rocks and concentrate paydirt for more efficient gold recovery. - BLACK SAND MAGNET WITH QUICK RELEASE - Portable 8lb magnetic pickup tool quickly removes magnetic black sand from concentrates; quick-release handle makes cleanup easy. - FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - Includes a 3oz snifter bottle for capturing fine flakes and a 2 dram glass vial to safely store your gold finds. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 9pc Gold Panning Kit with Classifiers

anthropic.title_differentiation: Three Dual Riffle Pans, Mini Classifiers, Black Sand Magnet, Snifter Bottle, Storage Vial, Sand Scoop

openai.title_differentiation: 3 Dual Riffle Pans, Mini Classifiers, Black Sand Magnet, Snifter Bottle, Gold Vial, Sand Scoop, Beginner Prospecting
